title: Spilotantha lehmannii
taxonomy: Spilotantha lehmannii is classified within the family Polygalaceae, commonly known as the milkwort family. This family consists of approximately 830 species of flowering plants. As a member of the Polygalaceae family, Spilotantha lehmannii is classified within the order Fabales. The order Fabales is part of the larger clade called eurosids II, which also includes other plant families such as Fabaceae. Spilotantha lehmannii's classification places it within the kingdom Plantae, indicating its status as a vascular plant.
